description: session-adopt re-keys an existing row: session_key flips from old to new, stdout prints 'adopted: <label> at <cwd> [session_key=<sha16(new)>]'. Deterministic since the new key is supplied.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at, receive_mode) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'peer', 'old-session-key', NULL, '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', 'interactive');
